Revert test playbook (test-windows-golden-image.yml) back to golden image defaults (vm_enable_sysprep: false)

human_actions_pending.action: Clean up demo-windows namespace and VM on SNO cluster when no longer needed

decisions.decision: Add both domain.memory.guest and domain.resources.requests.memory to Linux and Windows VM specs
decisions.rationale: Consistency — Linux had only guest, Windows had only requests; both should specify guest-visible memory and K8s scheduling requests

next_action: Commit the create_build_spec.yaml memory consistency fix. Revert test-windows-golden-image.yml to its golden image defaults (vm_enable_sysprep: false, assert sysprep disk NOT present). Then sync changes to osac-windows-vm-support-codeonly branch.
context_notes: Session focused on E2E validation and a code review fix. The E2E test ran successfully on second attempt (first failed due to cluster resource exhaustion). The test playbook was temporarily modified to enable sysprep — needs reverting before commit. The branch sync to osac-windows-vm-support-codeonly was requested but not completed.
